zh.Throkemerton, Worcestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Prudence de Compton於1235年出生在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓時，她的父親Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn75歲，母親Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton76歲。她於大約1250年與Robert de Throckmorton II在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1266年在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特塞頓 亞特 霍恩聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Compton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England (but especially in the southwest) named Compton, from Old English cumb ‘short, straight valley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cumpton
meanings: English (Herefordshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Compton  .

nameMeanings.name: Prudence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval form of the Latin name Prudentia, a feminine form of Prudentius, from prudens ‘provident’. The Blessed Prudentia was a 15th-century abbess who founded a new convent at Como in Italy. Later, among the Puritans in 17th-century England, Prudence was associated with the vocabulary word for the quality.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Prudence de Compton was born in 1235, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, her father, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, was 75 and her mother, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, was 76. She married Robert de Throckmorton II about 1250, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1266, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prudence de Compton est née en 1235, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, avait 76 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Throckmorton II environ 1250, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1266, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Robert de Throckmorton II circa 1250, nel Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Prudence de Comptonが1235年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンで生まれた時，父Lord Philip Cumton - Comynは75歳，母Lady Basilla Comyn de Comptonは76歳であった。約1250年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンでRobert de Throckmorton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1266年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントスットオン アト ホーンサイント ジョン ス バプティスト チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John The Baptist Churchyard, Fladb: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 수턴 앳 호니 세인트 존 테 바프티스트 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Prudence de Compton(이)가 1235년 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn(은)는 75세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton(은)는 76세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 Robert de Throckmorton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 수턴 앳 호니 세인트 존 테 바프티스트 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prudence de Compton nasceu em 1235, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, tinha 76 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Throckmorton II aproximadamente 1250, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1266, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint John the Baptist Churchyard, Sutton at Hone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint John The Baptist Churchyard, Fladb: сеинт джон т баптист чурчярд, суттон ат хоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prudence de Compton родилась в 1235 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, 76. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Throckmorton II около 1250 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1266 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт джон т баптист чурчярд, суттон ат хоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Robert de Throckmorton II aproximadamente 1250, en Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
